name: Choco Banana Peanut Cookies
recipeIngredient: 300 g Semisweet or Milk Chocolate Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together sugar, peanut butter, and shortening until well blended.
2. Stir in mashed banana and eggs; blend well.
3. Mix in the remaining ingredients.
4. Drop by tablespoon onto ungreased baking sheets.
5. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 12 to 15 minutes or until cookies are golden brown.
6. Cool on wire racks.
7. Store in an airtight container. Makes about 4 dozen. Cookies freeze well.
